member.name: M:ToDoList.Services.NotificationService.ScheduleAllTaskNotifications
member.summary: Schedules notifications for all upcoming tasks This runs in the background and sends notifications even when app is closed

member.name: M:ToDoList.Services.NotificationService.ScheduleTaskNotifications(ToDoList.Models.TodoTask)
member.summary: Schedules multiple notifications for a single task: - 3 days before due date - 1 day before due date - On due date (morning) - On due date (if still pending)

member.name: M:ToDoList.Services.NotificationService.CheckAndScheduleNotifications
member.summary: Old method - kept for backward compatibility Now just calls ScheduleAllTaskNotifications

member.name: T:ToDoList.Resource
member.summary: Android Resource Designer class. Exposes the Android Resource designer assembly into the project Namespace.
